self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can keep the shared Engine refactor honest by proving the staged Architecture path did not drift Runtime behavior.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result extends the focused staged Engine check with one Runtime control source.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP case, the staged Engine check verified only the Architecture path and relied on ad hoc runtime inspection for no-drift confidence.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future shared Engine refactors will fail quickly if they alter the default Runtime proof or integration behavior.

decision.rationale: The staged Engine verification is worth extending with one Runtime control case.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
